description: Comprehensive Istio monitoring dashboard providing insights into service mesh health, traffic management, performance, errors, resource usage, control plane, data plane, and security metrics.
title: Istio Monitoring Dashboard

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace where Istio is deployed
namespace.name: namespace

cluster.description: Kubernetes cluster name for multi-cluster setups
cluster.name: cluster

widgets.description: Section for high-level overview metrics
widgets.title: General Overview

widgets.description: Total number of requests processed by the service mesh

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Rate of incoming and outgoing requests per second

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.description: Average latency of requests within the mesh

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Average Latency

widgets.description: Percentage of failed requests compared to total requests

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Error Rate

widgets.description: Section for traffic management metrics
widgets.title: Traffic Management

widgets.description: Distribution of requests across different services and versions
widgets.title: Request Distribution

widgets.description: Number of circuit breaker events triggered
widgets.title: Circuit Breaker Events

widgets.description: Number of retry attempts and timeout occurrences
widgets.title: Retries and Timeouts

widgets.description: Request volume inbound vs outbound

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Inbound and Outbound Traffic

widgets.description: Section for performance metrics
widgets.title: Performance Metrics

widgets.description: Latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99) for requests

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment
namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment
namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Request Latency Percentiles

widgets.description: Number of requests processed per unit of time

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Throughput

widgets.description: Response times of individual services within the mesh
widgets.title: Service Response Times

widgets.description: CPU and memory usage for each service
widgets.title: Resource Utilization per Service

widgets.description: Section for error metrics
widgets.title: Error Metrics

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP errors (4xx, 5xx) across services

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND response_code >= '400' AND response_code < '500'
namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND response_code >= '500'

widgets.title: HTTP Error Rates

widgets.description: Rate of gRPC errors encountered in service communications

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND grpc_code != 'OK'

widgets.title: gRPC Error Rates

widgets.description: Number of failed requests attributed to each service

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND response_code >= '400'

widgets.title: Failed Requests by Service

widgets.description: Number of TLS handshake failures
widgets.title: TLS Handshake Failures

widgets.description: Section for resource usage metrics
widgets.title: Resource Usage

widgets.description: CPU usage for Istio control plane and data plane components
widgets.title: CPU Usage

widgets.description: Memory consumption of Istio components
widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Number of restarts for Istio pods
widgets.title: Pod Restarts

widgets.description: Disk input/output metrics for Istio components
widgets.title: Disk I/O

widgets.description: Section for control plane metrics
widgets.title: Control Plane Metrics

widgets.description: Number of configuration synchronizations performed by Pilot
widgets.title: Pilot Configuration Syncs

widgets.description: Number of requests handled by Mixer for policy and telemetry
widgets.title: Mixer Requests

widgets.description: Operations and performance of Galley
widgets.title: Galley Operations

widgets.description: Number of certificates issued by Citadel for mutual TLS
widgets.title: Citadel Certificate Expiry

widgets.description: Section for data plane metrics
widgets.title: Data Plane Metrics

widgets.description: Key metrics from Envoy proxies
widgets.title: Envoy Proxy Metrics

widgets.description: Volume of inbound and outbound traffic handled by data plane proxies
widgets.title: Data Plane Traffic

widgets.description: Resource consumption of Envoy proxies
widgets.title: Proxy Resource Usage

widgets.description: Number of connection errors encountered by data plane proxies
widgets.title: Connection Errors

widgets.description: Section for security metrics
widgets.title: Security Metrics

widgets.description: Number of connections secured with mutual TLS

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND connection_security_policy = 'mutual_tls'

widgets.title: Mutual TLS Usage

widgets.description: Metrics related to the enforcement of authorization policies
widgets.title: Authorization Policy Enforcement

widgets.description: Expiration status of certificates managed by Istio
widgets.title: Certificate Expiration

widgets.description: Number of security policy violations detected within the mesh

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND response_code = '403'

widgets.title: Security Policy Violations
